reasons: Minsitthar can restrict Mathilda's blink-style mobility inside King's Calling.
This limits Mathilda's ability to freely engage, disengage, or enable allies through mobility.

proof.summary: Mathilda wants to create mobility advantages with Guiding Wind and Circling Eagle, while Minsitthar can punish fights inside King's Calling by limiting blink movement.
worksBestWhen: Minsitthar casts King's Calling after Mathilda commits.
The team fights inside the anti-blink zone.
failureCases: Mathilda baits King's Calling and disengages.
Minsitthar casts too early or misses the key targets.
Mathilda plays only for poke and does not enter the field.

reasons: Khufra can punish Mathilda's mobility path with Bouncing Ball.
He can protect the target Mathilda wants to dive by turning her engage into a crowd-control window.

proof.summary: Mathilda wants to create a fast engage route, while Khufra can turn that mobility path into a crowd-control trap.
worksBestWhen: Khufra positions between Mathilda and her target.
Khufra waits for the actual mobility commit.
failureCases: Mathilda uses mobility outside Khufra's range.
Khufra wastes Bouncing Ball before Mathilda commits.
Mathilda's team pokes instead of diving.

reasons: Kaja can suppress Mathilda after she dives or enables an engage.
Dragging Mathilda away can break her team's tempo and remove her shield or mobility support.

proof.summary: Mathilda relies on fast entry and exit, while Kaja can lock her during the commitment window and force a pickoff.
worksBestWhen: Kaja saves ultimate for Mathilda's real engage.
failureCases: Mathilda baits the ultimate and escapes.
Kaja catches Mathilda but cannot finish her.
Enemy team counter-engages during Kaja's dive.

reasons: Franco can suppress Mathilda after she uses mobility to enter.
Hook pressure makes Mathilda less free to stand forward and prepare engages.

proof.summary: Mathilda wants to move in and out quickly, while Franco can punish the moment she becomes reachable with hook or suppression.
worksBestWhen: Franco tracks Mathilda's dash and ultimate cooldown.
Franco waits near the target Mathilda wants to enable.
failureCases: Franco misses hook and has no Flicker setup.
Mathilda dives with multiple allies and Franco cannot isolate her.

reasons: Valir can push back and slow dive attempts, making Mathilda's engage harder to complete.
His disengage tools punish teams that rely on Mathilda to start short-range fights.

proof.summary: Mathilda wants to bring herself or an ally into fight range, while Valir can reset spacing and punish short-range commitment.
worksBestWhen: Valir holds disengage until Mathilda commits.
failureCases: Valir is caught before he can cast.
Mathilda's team attacks from multiple angles.
Valir wastes his peel before the real engage.
